name: helloCounter
title: Hello Counter
subTitle: Minimal example widget — a configurable click counter. Use it as the starting point for your own widget.
releaseNotes: Example widget shipped with the harness to demonstrate the view/edit controller split, config persistence, jest unit tests, and the package/install flow.

metadata.description: Renders a counter starting at a configurable value. Clicking + / - adjusts it by the configured step. The label and starting value are set in the widget editor (edit.html) and persisted to the widget config.
